scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "FRONTEND,BACKEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run start --prefix backend"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "FRONTEND,BACKEND,AI" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run start --prefix backend" "cd ai-engine && .\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
